---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

::: {style="text-align: right;"}
Check my resume in pdf format! [My CV](files/akifboraerencv.pdf){.btn style="background-color: #1B9679; border-color: #1B9679; color: white;" target="_blank" role="button"}
:::

![](images/WhatsApp%20Image%202026-03-09%20at%2001.43.22.jpeg){fig-align="center" width="200"}

# Education

-   **M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University,** Ankara, Türkiye, 2025 - ongoing.

-   **B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University,** Ankara, Türkiye, 2020 - 2025

# Work Experience

## Internships

-   **OYAK Renault Otomobil Fabrikaları A.Ş.** Bursa, Türkiye Jul 2025 -- Aug 2025\
    *Production & Process Intern*

-   **Odelo Otomotiv Aydınlatma A.Ş.**  Bursa,Türkiye Jul 2023 -- Aug 2023\
    *Process Engineering Intern*

# Projects

-   **Generative AI Platform for Inventive Problem Solving (Graduation Project)** Oct *2024 -- June 2025\
    TUSAŞ (TAI)*

-   **Mobile Market Share Analysis** **(EMU430 Data Analytics Project)** Nov 2023 -- Jan 2024\
    Team Ctrl_S

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, PlayStation 2 softmodding

# Hobbies

Skiing, Chess, Football, Videogames
